task_completion.description: Verify the 'RespSurveillance' project was created and opened in Epi Info 7.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Epi Info 7 Form Designer window should be open, and the Project Explorer or window title should display 'RespSurveillance'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Patient Information' page was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A page tab, node in the Project Explorer, or canvas title should clearly indicate the existence of a page named 'Patient Information'.

task_completion.description: Verify the basic text fields on the 'Patient Information' page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the 'Patient Information' form canvas, there should be input fields labeled 'CaseID', 'FirstName', 'LastName', and 'County'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Date, Number, and Legal Values fields on the 'Patient Information' page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the 'Patient Information' form canvas, there should be a 'DOB' field (formatted as a date picker), an 'Age' field (numeric input), and a 'Sex' field (dropdown menu for Legal Values).

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Clinical Information' page was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A second page tab, node in the Project Explorer, or canvas title should clearly indicate the existence of a page named 'Clinical Information'.

task_completion.description: Verify the fields on the 'Clinical Information' page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the 'Clinical Information' form canvas, there should be an 'OnsetDate' field (date picker) and fields for 'Fever', 'Cough', 'SoreThroat', and 'Dyspnea' (typically formatted as Yes/No dropdowns, radio buttons, or checkboxes).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Epi Info 7 Form Designer GUI to create the form.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Epi Info 7 Form Designer interface with the drag-and-drop canvas, field definition dialog boxes, or project explorer, rather than a text editor modifying XML/project files directly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Epi Info 7 application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window should have standard Windows/Linux borders, Epi Info 7 toolbars, and menus, confirming it is the real software and not a mockup.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply paste the prompt text into a single text box.
integrity.visual_evidence: The form should contain distinct, individual UI elements (labels paired with input boxes, dropdowns, date pickers) rather than a single large text block containing the task description.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts: The expected number of records is 3, and the expected case IDs are RS-0001, RS-0002, and RS-0003 (though data entry may not be explicitly required in the current form-design step). Note: If check code is visible, the YEARS function documented by CDC requires two date parameters (e.g., YEARS(DOB, SYSTEMDATE)), despite any metadata claiming it only requires one.
